retrieved_result: Traditional Maori symbols and meanings: Caption Maori symbols are shared between many artforms including what we do, pounamu carving, and Ta Moko, body and face tattoo. Caption Semi carved koru designs representing growth by our head honcho John Sheehan Jnr pictured there on the left. Caption Hei tiki are said to represent the first man.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses traditional Maori symbols and meanings, not TikTok trends, 2024 trends, or anything related to TikTok trends. Therefore not relevant.

history.title: Traditional Maori symbols and meanings
history.description: "Caption Maori symbols are shared between many artforms including what we do, pounamu carving, and Ta Moko, body and face tattoo. Caption Semi carved koru designs representing growth by our head honcho John Sheehan Jnr pictured there on the left. Caption Hei tiki are said to represent the first man,
